exclusions: RogueDLC, RogueNous, RogueMagic, RogueTourn and RogueEndless-owned rows
presentation, account rewards and historical weekly scheduling

worlds.membership_basis: Distinct world ordinals 1-9 reachable from the latest non-empty RogueManager schedule; legacy Worlds 1-3 derive their ordinal from RogueAreaID because AreaProgress is absent.

world_difficulties.membership_basis: Non-activity RogueAreaConfig rows referenced by the latest non-empty RogueManager schedule.

paths.membership_basis: All nine RogueAeon rows; RogueAeonListConfig DLC-only display rows are not path membership.

resonances_and_formations.membership_basis: Per-path level-1 Legendary RogueBuff rows with canonical suffix 20-23; suffix 24-27 interplays are excluded.

blessings.membership_basis: The canonical 18 selectable Blessings per path: suffixes 30-32, 40-46 and 50-57 at level 1.

blessing_levels.membership_basis: RogueMazeBuff level rows whose IDs belong to the 162 main-world Blessings.

curios.membership_basis: RogueHandbookMiracle rows whose MiracleTypeList includes the CosmosRogue type 100.

curio_states.membership_basis: RogueMiracle state rows linked to a CosmosRogue type-100 handbook Curio.

occurrences.membership_basis: RogueHandBookEvent rows whose EventTypeList includes the CosmosRogue type 100.

occurrence_variants.membership_basis: Base-mode NPC progress IDs below 100000 referenced by CosmosRogue handbook events; DLC-prefixed variants are excluded.

domains.membership_basis: All nine base RogueRoomType rows used by CosmosRogue topology.

ability_tree.membership_basis: All base RogueTalent nodes; reward-only interpretation is deferred to normalized classification.

run_bonuses.membership_basis: All base RogueBonus definitions; availability and replacement generations remain explicit normalized fields.

shops.membership_basis: All base RogueShop definitions; DLC-owned shop tables are excluded.

map_nodes.membership_basis: All base RogueMap nodes below the explicitly activity-owned 10000+ map range.

rooms.membership_basis: All base RogueRoom rows except the 1000000+ Adventure minigame room family, which is outside the first run-policy slice.

encounter_groups.membership_basis: RogueMonsterGroup rows directly referenced by the content map of base combat, encounter, elite or boss rooms.

encounter_members.membership_basis: RogueMonster rows transitively referenced by the frozen main-world encounter groups.
